subcodes.first_line: ...As to the question of Huquq: In no wise shouldst thou make statements requiring any person to pay the Huquq. However if a devoted and self-sacrificing soul freely and spontaneously offereth
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @power of the Manifestation of God, @law of Huququ'llah, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @Shrines and Holy places, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
